author: doll-agent
content: Add Polynomial::integ_with_bounds(m, k, lbnd, scl) on the power basis. Each integration step: integrate-with-zero-constant, divide all coeffs by scl, then set coeffs[0] so eval(lbnd) == k[step]. lbnd=0, scl=1 matches the existing integ. Power basis only for now — Chebyshev/Hermite/etc filed as follow-up since the value-at-lbnd computation needs basis-specific eval. 5 tests cover scl-default parity, lbnd-zero behavior, lbnd-with-k value, scl divider, and zero-scl error.
